title: Best Hotels in Phitsanulok Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The Phitsanulok hotels that actually help plan the stay: a river-side heritage base, practical central city hotels, one resort-style option, and one reliable budget chain backed by direct sites.
intro: Phitsanulok hotel choice is mostly about what kind of stop you are building. If the old-center temples and river side matter, stay near that core. If you mainly want a practical room for a short stop or onward drive, a simpler city hotel or budget chain makes more sense. The better shortlist follows that logic and stays on direct-source properties instead of scraped price tables.

items.name: Yodia Heritage Hotel
items.description: The clearest old-center riverside stay if you want the room itself to support the city's historical side rather than only serve as a bed for the night.
highlights: Heart of the historical part of the city
insider_tips: Choose this when temple access and the old-center feel matter more than pure road convenience.
items.current_info: Yodia's direct site still presents the property as being in the heart of the historical part of the city on the bank of the Nan River.

items.name: Topland Hotel & Convention Centre
items.description: A practical central city-hotel format that works when you want current rooms, dining, and a strong address near the old center.
insider_tips: A good fit if you want a full-service city-hotel base without shifting fully into resort mode.
items.current_info: Topland's direct site still confirms the Akathodsarod Street address, central Phitsanulok location, and in-house dining lineup.

items.name: Pattara Resort & Spa
items.description: The strongest resort-style option if you want a greener property feel while still staying inside the city orbit.
insider_tips: Best when you want the hotel itself to feel like part of the trip, not just a practical overnight.
items.current_info: Pattara's direct site still positions the property in the center of Phitsanulok near the city's attractions.

items.name: Shinnabhura Historic Boutique Hotel
items.description: A character-led boutique stay on the Wat Chan side when you want a more distinctive room than a generic city-hotel format.
items.location: 59/59 Moo 10, Wat Chan, Muang District, Phitsanulok
insider_tips: A better pick when style and identity matter more than being in the most central address.
items.current_info: Shinnabhura's direct site still presents the property as a historic boutique hotel in Phitsanulok with its own restaurant and current contact details.

items.name: HOP INN Phitsanulok
items.description: The strongest simple budget-chain base if you mainly need a clean, predictable room for a short city stop or onward travel.
items.location: 66/6 Moo 10, Siharat Decho Chai Road, Wat Chan
insider_tips: This makes the most sense when the room is a base, not the destination.
items.current_info: HOP INN's direct site still presents the property as a budget hotel in Phitsanulok with 79 rooms and the current Wat Chan-side address.
